title: Update module github.com/sigstore/rekor to v1.2.0 [SECURITY] - autoclosed
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sigstore/rekor](https://togithub.com/sigstore/rekor) | indirect | minor | `v1.1.2-0.20230508234306-ad288b385a44` -> `v1.2.0` |

### GitHub Vulnerability Alerts

#### [CVE-2023-33199](https://togithub.com/sigstore/rekor/security/advisories/GHSA-frqx-jfcm-6jjr)

### Impact
A malformed proposed entry of the `intoto/v0.0.2` type can cause a panic on a thread within the Rekor process. The thread is recovered so the client receives a 500 error message and service still continues, so the availability impact of this is minimal.

### Patches
This is fixed in v1.2.0 of Rekor.

### Workarounds
No

### References
Discovered by OSS-Fuzz

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - "" in timezone UTC, Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Never, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.

In the [dependabot PR (closed) Miloslav said the size-increase](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18709#issuecomment-1581404950) is expected.

Edit: Miloslav also said the impact/affect of the CVE on podman isn't great.  So I don't think there's any rush to merge this.
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18835 should contain the same thing without the extra bloat.

> https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18835 should contain the same thing without the extra bloat.

@Luap99 @mtrmac I see an update to this package is [queued for c/image (will open on Monday)](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/228).  FYI, in case that also needs a bloat-free update and/or closing.
